mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_comments (content, flag, group_id, user_id, parent_id) VALUES (#{content}, #{flag}, #{groupId}, #{userId}, #{parentId})
mapper.select: SELECT comment_id, content, created_at, updated_at, flag, group_id, user_id, parent_id FROM group_comments WHERE group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT comment_id, content, created_at, updated_at, flag, group_id, user_id, parent_id FROM group_comments WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
